call-http-endpoint.description: Calls an HTTP endpoint from a Liferay OpenAPI. Never call a batch endpoint, always use individual operations.

path.description: The full endpoint path starting with / relative to $BASE_URL. Do not include the leading /o.

payload.description: The endpoint payload. Can be an empty string if there is no payload.

get-openapis.description: Retrieves the current available Liferay OpenAPIs. Use it to discover the most suitable API that could fulfill the user request. The flow should be: get-openapis, get-openapi, call-http-endpoint. If you are not sure about what the user wants, just call this to get an idea of what is possible.
